title: loxoscaphe concinnum
intro: Loxoscaphe concinnum, also known as the hairy daisy or pyrethrum daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to repel insects due to its pyrethrin content. The pyrethrin in Loxoscaphe concinnum has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and acting as an antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat skin conditions and soothe digestive issues.
